title: Unbounded response body reads before size check
description: In federation.rs, fetch_actor() (line ~196) and resolve_webfinger() (line ~235) call resp.bytes().await to read the entire response body into memory, then check if body_bytes.len() > 1_048_576. A malicious server can force OOM by sending a multi-GB response. Fix: use reqwest's body streaming with a size-limited reader, or set Content-Length limits on the reqwest client, or read in chunks and abort once the limit is exceeded.
